description_long: This is a tall, freestanding shelving unit made of light-colored wood, featuring five open shelves and a base section with two small drawers. The front face displays vertical paneling on the backboard, adding a subtle decorative touch. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage or display space for books, decor, or other items. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel matching the wood grain of the rest of the structure. The drawers at the bottom have small, unobtrusive knobs, blending seamlessly with the overall design. The finish is matte, giving the surface a smooth but non-glossy appearance.
description: A tall, light wood shelving unit with five open shelves and two small drawers at the base, featuring a matte finish and subtle vertical paneling.
description_view_0: Front view showing five open shelves, vertical paneling, and two small drawers at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the unit's depth and plain, flat side panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wood back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the flat, featureless panel.
